front: What is a companion diagnostic for peptide therapeutics?
back: Companion diagnostics identify patients who will benefit from specific peptide drugs. Examples: 1) HER2 testing for trastuzumab, 2) PD-L1 expression for immunotherapy peptides, 3) Tumor mutational burden for neoantigen vaccines, 4) MSI/dMMR for pembrolizumab. Regulatory: FDA CDx approval required for some drugs.
